backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the 'huzluxe.in' domain link was implemented in ContactFooter.tsx and Navigation.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'HUZLUXE', links a favicon, and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout by rendering Navigation, HeroSection, AboutSection, FeaturesSection, and ContactFooter in sequence.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column about section featuring an orbital logo graphic with stat cards on the left and descriptive brand copy with checkmark highlights on the right.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Combined contact form and footer component with a mailto-based form, contact info cards including a Globe-icon website link to huzluxe.in, social links, and footer navigation.
Six-card responsive features grid showcasing capabilities like performance, security, and analytics, with amber icon badges and hover glow effects.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background image, gradient overlays, animated brand badge, headline, dual CTA buttons, and a stats row.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with scroll-aware active section tracking, smooth scroll on link click, mobile menu toggle, and a logo with the HUZLUXE brand and huzluxe.in domain link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/clear functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark charcoal + warm amber OKLCH color palette via CSS variables, Tailwind base/utilities layers, and custom utility classes for glows, gradients, and nav blur.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (amber, charcoal, sidebar), custom shadows, border radii, keyframe animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, feature history, and the current user requirements including branding updates, contact form addition, and domain display for the HUZLUXE landing site.
